storeCopy.shortDescription: AI assistant for chat, documents, voice, search, and productivity workflows.
storeCopy.subtitle: AI chat, documents, voice, and productivity
storeCopy.fullDescription: Sira GPT is an AI productivity assistant for chat, document workflows, voice, search, and project work. Use it to ask questions, work with files, generate or revise documents, and coordinate daily AI-powered tasks from the SiraGPT platform.

requiredAccountActions: Real Android device verification through Play Console mobile app
Target audience and app access declarations

macos.distribution: Developer ID signed and notarized DMG/ZIP

windows.distribution: signed NSIS installer and portable EXE
requiredAccountActions: Microsoft Partner Center app reservation if publishing in Microsoft Store
Microsoft Store listing metadata and privacy URL if store-distributed

dataTypes.name: User messages, prompts, projects, generated content, files, and documents
Uploaded images, audio, and voice recordings when the user uses those features
Subscription status, payment provider identifiers, and receipts
App interactions, diagnostics, crash logs, IP address, device, browser, and session data

android: Tablet screenshots if tablet distribution is enabled
ios: iPhone screenshots for required device classes
iPad screenshots if iPad support remains enabled
macos: Installer screenshots or product page assets if published externally
windows: Store logos and screenshots if Microsoft Store distributed
